scripts.lint:docs: npm run lint:docs:markdown && npm run lint:docs:html
scripts.format:preview: prettier --ignore-unknown --write package.json package-lock.json tsconfig.preview.json eslint.config.mjs .prettierrc.json .prettierignore README.md "docs/**/*.md" "internal/preview/preview_ui_src/**/*.{html,ts,vue}" "internal/preview/preview_ui/*.html"
scripts.format:preview:check: prettier --ignore-unknown --check package.json package-lock.json tsconfig.preview.json eslint.config.mjs .prettierrc.json .prettierignore README.md "docs/**/*.md" "internal/preview/preview_ui_src/**/*.{html,ts,vue}" "internal/preview/preview_ui/*.html"
